name: neruva-record
summary: Auto-record + pre-action mistake recall + per-domain routing + QBound deterministic KG recall + inspectable recall chain. v0.23: `neruva-record-migrate-to-kg` populates per-domain QBound KGs from existing records, `neruva-replay recall-path` inspects the exact recall chain (proves deterministic replay). 11 default domains. Probe-c bench: 100% drift accuracy std 0.0.
